infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Morongwa uses the camera for video calls with other users.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Morongwa uses the microphone for voice and video calls.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Morongwa needs access to your photos and videos to create QwertyTV posts (images, video, Qwertz, cover art).
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Morongwa may save media to your library when you choose to export or save content.

plugins.photosPermission: Morongwa needs access to your photos and videos to create QwertyTV posts (images, video, Qwertz, cover art).
